info.title: Gong
info.description: Connector for the Gong Revenue Intelligence platform. Manage calls, users, stats, meetings, CRM data, permissions, engagement, and more.

get.description: Retrieve call data by date range.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Optional workspace ID to filter calls.

post.description: Add a new call to Gong. After adding, upload the media using Add Call Recording.

clientUniqueId.description: A unique identifier for the call in your system.

actualStart.description: Actual start time of the call (ISO 8601).

primaryUser.description: Email address of the primary user (host).

downloadMediaUrl.description: URL to download the media file.

callId.description: The ID of the newly created call.

url.description: URL to the call in Gong.

get.description: Retrieve data for a specific call.

put.description: Upload a media file for a call. The call must have been created first using Add Call.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Call ID returned from Add Call.

parameters.name: mediaFile
parameters.description: The media file to upload (audio or video).

post.description: Retrieve detailed call data with content, interaction stats, and collaboration for specific calls.

callIds.description: List of call IDs to retrieve.

contentSelector.description: Controls which content fields to include.

put.description: Give specific users access to calls.

delete.description: Remove specific users' access from calls.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all users in the Gong account.
Retrieve data for a specific user by ID.
Retrieve the settings change history for a specific user.

post.description: Retrieve extensive user data for specific users or the entire account.

userIds.description: Optional list of user IDs to filter.

createdFromDateTime.description: Filter users created from this date (ISO 8601).

createdToDateTime.description: Filter users created to this date (ISO 8601).

post.description: Retrieve scorecard statistics for calls within a date range.
Retrieve day-by-day activity statistics for users.
Retrieve aggregated activity statistics for multiple users across a date range.
Retrieve aggregated activity statistics for multiple users broken down by time period.
Retrieve interaction statistics (talk ratio, interactivity, etc.) for calls.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all configured scorecards.
Retrieve a list of all workspaces in the Gong account.
Retrieve a list of all library folders.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Optional workspace ID to filter folders.

get.description: Retrieve the content of a specific library folder.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: The ID of the library folder.

post.description: Create a new meeting in Gong (Beta).

meetingId.description: The ID of the newly created meeting.

put.description: Update an existing meeting in Gong (Beta).

delete.description: Delete an existing meeting in Gong (Beta).

post.description: Validate the status of a meeting integration (Beta).

get.description: Retrieve all data associated with a specific email address for data privacy purposes.

parameters.name: emailAddress
parameters.description: The email address to look up.

200.description: Data associated with the email address

get.description: Retrieve all data associated with a specific phone number for data privacy purposes.

parameters.name: phoneNumber
parameters.description: The phone number to look up.

200.description: Data associated with the phone number

post.description: Purge all data associated with a specific email address. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: emailAddress
parameters.description: The email address to purge data for.

post.description: Purge all data associated with a specific phone number. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: phoneNumber
parameters.description: The phone number to purge data for.

post.description: Upload CRM entities (accounts, contacts, deals, leads, etc.) into Gong.

parameters.name: objectType
parameters.description: The type of CRM object being uploaded.

parameters.name: dataFile
parameters.description: The data file containing CRM entities (JSON lines format).

get.description: Retrieve CRM objects that were previously uploaded to Gong.

parameters.name: objectsCrmIds
parameters.description: CRM IDs of the objects to retrieve.

put.description: Register or update a CRM integration with Gong.

get.description: Retrieve details for a CRM integration.

delete.description: Delete a CRM integration and all its data from Gong.

parameters.name: integrationId
parameters.description: The CRM integration identifier to delete.

put.description: Define the schema for a CRM entity type in an integration.

type.description: Field type (STRING, NUMBER, DATE, BOOLEAN, REFERENCE).

get.description: Retrieve the schema for a CRM entity type.
Retrieve the status of a CRM upload request.

parameters.name: clientRequestId
parameters.description: The client request ID provided during upload.

put.description: Report a content shared engagement event (Beta).

reportingSystem.description: Name of the system reporting the event.

companyUserEmail.description: Email of the company user who shared content.

put.description: Report a content viewed engagement event (Beta).

reportingSystem.description: Name of the system reporting the event.

put.description: Report a custom engagement action event (Beta).

reportingSystem.description: Name of the system reporting the event.

get.description: Retrieve audit logs from Gong.

parameters.name: logType
parameters.description: The type of log to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieve all permission profiles for a workspace.
Retrieve a specific permission profile.
Retrieve users assigned to a specific permission profile.
Retrieve Engage flows for a user (Alpha).

post.description: Retrieve flows associated with specific prospects (Alpha).
Assign prospects to an Engage flow (Alpha).

assignToEmail.description: Email of the user to assign the flow to.

post.description: Upload digital interaction events to Gong (Alpha).
Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio. Exposes Gong API operations as MCP tools.

totalRecords.description: Total number of records matching the filter.

currentPageSize.description: Number of records in the current page.

cursor.description: Cursor to retrieve the next page of results.

url.description: URL to the call in Gong.

libraryFolderAccess.description: Level of access to library folders.
Level of access to library folders.

tags.name: Library
tags.description: Operations related to the content library
